comment: Vault registry. Copy to rag/vaults.json and edit. Reading is unified: every vault here is indexed into one database. Writing is governed by rag/routing.json. path_env wins over path_default; paths support ~ and $VARS. exclude_underscore_prefix keeps _inbox/-style staging folders out of retrieval. Diode guardrail: every vault path must live under one of allowed_roots (default: the repo root containing this file); iCloud paths are always refused.

vaults.label: User model: communication style, environment, facts
